headline: /C O R R E C T I O N -- CPower Energy/
summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC), a leading global designer and manufacturer of power generation and energy storage products and solutions, and CPower Energy ("CPower"), a leading Virtual Power Plant (VPP) platform, today announced a collaboration to support commercial and industrial (C&I) customers across PJM, North America's largest grid, by leveraging distributed generation to achieve greater resiliency and demand response outcomes at a time when soaring electricity demand is pushing power
